# Neptun ProW+WiFi Local Bridge 0.2.5

Maintenance release focused on code cleanup and packaging refresh.

## Highlights
- Refactored MQTT command routing in the bridge script.
- Removed dead duplicate command-handling branches.
- Reduced duplication in Home Assistant Discovery and MQTT attribute publishing.
- Refreshed release artifacts and synced documentation with the current add-on state.

## Compatibility
- MQTT topics are unchanged.
- Existing Home Assistant entities remain compatible.
- Installation and update flow are unchanged.
